en: Hello, I've waited here for you, live alone
ko: 안녕, 여기서 너를 기다리고 있어, 혼자서

en: Tonight, I'll throw myself into the blue
ko: 오늘 밤, 파란색으로 나를 던질 거야

en: And out of the red, out of the hedgeless sand
Come down and waste away with me, down with me
Slow down, you wanted it to be
The bone of my head, out of the hedgeless sand
ko: 내 머리의 뼈, 울타리가 없는 모래에서
